title: Seafood Stew
ingredients: 1 pound white fish (flounder, sole, orange roughy)
1 pound uncooked medium or large shrimp, shelled and deveined
instructions: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat.
Stir in flour and cook, stirring constantly until flour is dark brown, about 10 minutes.
Add celery, green pepper, garlic, and cook until vegetables are lightly browned and tender, about 10-15 minutes.
Stir in curry powder and cook 1 minute.
Add tomatoes, water, sugar, red pepper flakes, and salt.
Heat to a boil, then reduce heat to low and keep warm.
Pour sauce into 2-quart casserole dish and arrange fish and shrimp in sauce.
Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve with crusty bread.
notes: Serve with good crusty bread to dip in stew
